test.observation: 369 tests passed with 57 warnings (deprecation warnings for ft.Audio). All unit tests pass.

typecheck.observation: TypeScript compilation clean with no errors. Notes about untyped functions in ram_detection.py, api_client.py, session_detail_page.py, session_page.py, and history_page.py are not errors.

lint.observation: Ruff linter clean with no warnings or errors.

reviewsSummary.note: All 10 features were reviewed in previous rounds (rounds 1-3). No new implementation features were added since round 3. This round was a validation re-run to confirm validators pass after type annotation fixes.

reviewHistory.note: Re-validation after type annotation fixes in error_components.py. Fixed 3 mypy errors: added Optional import and corrected type hints for custom_message, title, and content parameters.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Network error classification logic (_is_network_error_message, _classify_network_error) is duplicated verbatim in 3 screens (login_screen.py, register_screen.py, session_page.py). Should be refactored into a shared utility in error_components.py.
nonBlockingIssues.note: Non-blocking suggestion from round 3. Remains unaddressed but does not block validation.

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed type annotations: added 'from typing import Optional' import and changed 'custom_message: str = None' to 'custom_message: Optional[str] = None', 'title: str = None' to 'title: Optional[str] = None', and 'content: str = None' to 'content: Optional[str] = None'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: shared error classification utilities should be placed in dedicated modules (e.g., error_utils.py) rather than duplicated across screens. When adding error handling to multiple screens, extract common patterns into reusable utilities.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ui-error-handling review found _is_network_error_message and _classify_network_error duplicated across 3 screens verbatim.
